hooks.command: cd "$(git rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir)/.." && uv run --directory .claude-memory-compiler python hooks/session-start.py
cd "$(git rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir)/.." && uv run --directory .claude-memory-compiler python hooks/pre-compact.py
cd "$(git rev-parse --path-format=absolute --git-common-dir)/.." && uv run --directory .claude-memory-compiler python hooks/session-end.py
